market_overview.bias_label: Mixed - Bulls in Control but Fragile
market_overview.headline: Market showing bull structure with 43% Full Bull stocks, but major indices displaying bearish cross risks and crypto weakness signals potential headwinds.
market_overview.detail: SPY and QQQ both Full Bull but with tight EMA spreads creating bearish cross risks, while BTC remains in Bear Rally structure showing crypto divergence. Energy minerals dominate with 100% bull participation, but tech and financials remain polarized.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Candidates - Early Bottom Signals

items.name: QUALCOMM Incorporated
items.note: Strong semiconductor rally with 8W EMA about to cross bullishly above 13W, suggesting tech bottom formation

items.name: Microsoft Corporation
items.note: Tech giant showing early reversal signs with AWS growth narrative and potential 8W/13W bullish cross

items.name: Visa Inc.
items.note: Payments leader rallying from bear structure with tight EMA spread suggesting imminent bullish cross

items.name: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc.
items.note: Cybersecurity strength with 8W EMA nearly crossing above 13W, indicating potential trend reversal

items.name: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. New

items.note: Warren Buffett's conglomerate showing multiple bullish crossover setups in Full Bear structure

pullback_setups.headline: Quality Pullback Entries in Established Uptrends

items.name: Corning Incorporated
items.note: Cramer-endorsed fiber optics play pulling back on normal volume - orderly selling in strong uptrend

items.name: Cameco Corporation
items.note: Uranium leader with low volume pullback suggesting minimal selling pressure in nuclear renaissance theme

items.name: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc.
items.note: Hotel chain showing elevated volume on pullback - monitor for institutional distribution risk

items.name: Chubb Limited
items.note: Insurance leader with shallow pullback on normal volume in established uptrend

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Technology Leading Momentum Surge
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology dominates momentum leaders with chip and storage names showing massive EMA spreads. INTC, WDC, STX leading semiconductor recovery while LITE and CIEN power optical component rally.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Minerals Perfect, Tech Polarized

strongest.note: Perfect bull participation across all energy mineral stocks amid Iran tensions
Industrial strength with 89% bull participation and minimal bearish stocks
Service sector resilience supporting industrial theme strength

weakest.note: Biotech carnage continues with three-quarters of health tech names in bear structure
Business services sector under pressure with 80% bear participation
Software sector remains bifurcated with two-thirds in bearish structure

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth sectors into cyclicals and energy, with health tech experiencing severe technical deterioration while industrial themes strengthen.

items.text: SPY and QQQ showing bearish cross risks with tight EMA spreads - major index structure vulnerable
BTC divergence in Bear Rally while equities Full Bull suggests crypto correlation breakdown
Health technology sector in severe bear structure with -66.7% net score - biotech breakdown accelerating
High volume pullbacks in names like HLT and TER suggest potential institutional distribution

news_drivers.headline: What Moved Markets
news_drivers.summary: Iran tensions dominating energy complex with Trump discussing extended blockade and Iran's currency collapsing. AWS strength boosting cloud themes while Fed rate dissent creates policy uncertainty backdrop.

items.text: Iran blockade extension talks driving energy minerals to 100% bull participation
Amazon AWS 28% growth supporting cloud infrastructure and tech hardware themes
Major Fed rate dissent creating policy uncertainty despite Powell staying on
Iran's rial hitting record lows amplifying geopolitical energy premium
China sanctions escalation on Iranian oil trade supporting energy complex
